title: Khejroli Heat Wave
lead: Khejroli is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.23. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khejroli has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 13.8 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 29%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 6.6 km/h, providing little relief. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no cold relief in sight.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
